subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face towards God! With an expansive heart did I read thy eloquent missive, and with a heart overflowing with humility did I supplicate unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المتوجه الی الله انی بصدر رحیب تلوت النمیق و دعوت الله بقلب طافح بالذل و
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @humility; meekness; lowliness
